sentences.arabic: مِنَ الضَّرُورِيِّ تَحْقِيقُ التَّوَازُنِ بَيْنَ الْعَمَلِ وَالْحَيَاةِ الشَّخْصِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Neophodno je postići ravnotežu između posla i privatnog života.
sentences.translationEn: It is necessary to achieve a balance between work and personal life.

sentences.arabic: أَقْضِي وَقْتَ الْفَرَاغِ مَعَ عَائِلَتِي بَعْدَ انْتِهَاءِ الدَّوَامِ.
sentences.translation: Slobodno vrijeme provodim sa svojom porodicom nakon završetka radnog vremena.
sentences.translationEn: I spend my free time with my family after work hours end.

sentences.arabic: الرَّاحَةُ الْكَافِيَةُ تُسَاعِدُنِي عَلَى زِيَادَةِ الْإِنْتَاجِيَّةِ فِي الْمَكْتَبِ.
sentences.translation: Dovoljan odmor mi pomaže da povećam produktivnost u uredu.
sentences.translationEn: Sufficient rest helps me increase productivity in the office.
